diagrams.title: Parse Tree Example for a + b * c
diagrams.description: Complete parse tree showing grammar productions for expression grammar
diagrams.purpose: Understand concrete syntax representation showing all derivation steps

diagrams.title: AST for a + b * c
diagrams.description: Abstract syntax tree with operators as internal nodes and operands as leaves
diagrams.purpose: Learn to create condensed semantic representation

diagrams.title: DAG for Common Subexpression
diagrams.description: DAG showing shared subexpression a+b appearing twice
elements: Single node for a+b with two parent pointers
Parent 1: a+b used in x = a+b
Parent 2: a+b used in y = a+b
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how DAGs optimize by sharing nodes

diagrams.title: Expression Tree to Postfix Conversion
elements: In-order traversal: infix, Post-order: postfix, Pre-order: prefix

diagrams.title: SDT Attribute Flow
diagrams.description: Parse tree showing synthesized (bottom-up) and inherited (top-down) attribute flow
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how semantic information propagates during parsing
